title: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page
seoTitle: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Speeding Gallimimus sprinting across a prehistoric open plain with cycads. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Gallimimus had a toothless beak, large eyes, and long, slender legs that made it one of the fastest dinosaurs, capable of speeds up to 35 mph.
Gallimimus was an omnivore, using its beak to forage for plants, seeds, insects, and small animals.
